future_separate_approval_envelope.backtest_formula: 4 frozen Development slices x Baseline/Candidate x RUN-A/RUN-B

insufficient_for: reopening threshold or whole-branch deletion research
recommendation_reason: The four frozen slices establish time dependency, but they do not attribute the sign change to a predeclared router context. A time slice cannot be substituted for a market regime.
required_human_decisions: declare one exact runtime-observable router context without using time slices as regime labels
approve a new medium-risk Proposal and its semantic fingerprint
approve a newly compiled Campaign fingerprint and exact single-variable diff allowlist
approve at most one Candidate and 16 Development-only Backtests
